productDisplayName: ADIDAS Blue Resp Trail 18 M Sports Shoe
description: Take running to the next level with these Resp Trail 18M shoes from adidas. The sleek design with the sturdy structure and high performance features helps you run better for longer. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperAir mesh uppers with synthetic overlays for excellent ventillationadidas patented 3-Stripe design on the sides for enhanced support and to exude the brand’s belief in performanceLace-ups for snug FitMesh tongue for greater breathabilityCushioned collar for greater comfortBrand name embossed on the tongue and on the heelMidsoleRemovable footbed that can be replaced with a medical orthoticadiPRENE® in the forefoot maintains propulsion and efficiencyOutsoleFORMOTION technology on the outsole adapts to the ground to ensure the smoothest, most comfortable run possibleadiPRENE® gives superior cushioning on impactadiWEAR® outsole with aggressive mult-directional lugs with small spikes on the forefoot and heel offers better grip on trails and  durabilityTORSION® provides midfoot supportFlex grooves provide greater flexibility to the feetshoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirtDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
